# PAN type update on partner dashboard

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: March 5, 2024 3:44 PM
Status: Pending Review
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:15 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani
Tasks: MFD data update for PAN types (https://app.notion.com/p/MFD-data-update-for-PAN-types-ba4fe926de4c448ea5ab4b66b8edb55a?pvs=21)
Tags: B2B2C

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Add new PAN type for payout details on partner dashboard
- Update existing PAN type
- PAN and GST validation

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements

### Requirement for PAN type update

Existing PAN Type and GST visibility based on PAN type selection

| **PAN type** | **GST visibility** | **GST Optional?** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| LLP | Yes | Yes |
| HUF | Yes | Yes |
| Private limited | Yes | Yes |
| Individual | No | NA |
| Sole proprietor | Yes | Yes |

Updated PAN Type and GST visibility based on PAN type selection

| **PAN type** | **GST visibility** | **GST Optional?** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Resident Individual (Self) | Yes | Yes |
| Resident Individual (Other) | Yes | Yes |
| Private Limited Company | Yes | Yes |
| Limited Liability Partnership | Yes | Yes |
| Sole proprietor | Yes | Yes |
| Partnership | Yes | Yes |
| HUF | Yes | Yes |
| OPC (One-Person Company) | Yes | Yes |
| Other | Yes | Yes |

Notes: 

- When user select other option in PAN type selection, we need to open “Enter PAN type” text input box below PAN type select field and “Enter PAN type” text input filed will be required field
- We need to save Value entered by user as PAN type in backend
- When user change PAN type selection from other to any other PAN type then remove “Enter PAN type” text input field

### Requirement for PAN number and GST number validation

- Allow user to enter GST when PAN number is filled and valid, user should not be able to enter GST first and than PAN
- When user enter PAN and then GST, we need to do validation based on below requirement
- GST validation requirement
    - GST number should be alphanumeric
    - GST number length should be 15 character
    - GST number should contain PAN number entered by user
        - Sample PAN: AAACH7409R
        - Sample GST number: 09AAACH7409R1ZZ
    - GST input field validation error message: **Please enter valid GST number**
